mapper.select: SELECT token_id, refresh_token, ip, user_agent, is_valid, member_id, created_at, updated_at FROM token WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_valid = true LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO token(token_id, refresh_token, ip, user_agent, is_valid, member_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tokenId}, #{refreshToken}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{isValid}, #{memberId}, NOW(), NOW())
